title: Isomorphic Strings
hints: Check if the first occurrence of every character in s aligns perfectly with the first occurrence of the corresponding character in t.
Use two hash maps to track the unique mapping from characters in s to t and vice versa to ensure a one-to-one relationship.
While iterating, verify that each character in s maps to the same character in t consistently, and that no two distinct characters in s map to the same character in t.
